title: Media Generation Tools
description: JSON Schema definitions for media generation and capture tools available to the ideas-brillantes assistant. Supports AI image generation, video generation, text-to-speech synthesis, screen recording, and audio transcription.

tools.name: generate_image
tools.description: Generate an image from a text prompt using the configured AI image generation backend.

prompt.description: Text description of the image to generate.

output_path.description: Optional file path to save the generated image (e.g. '/home/user/images/output.png'). If omitted, a temporary path is returned.

tools.name: generate_video
tools.description: Generate a short video clip from a text prompt using the configured AI video generation backend.

prompt.description: Text description of the video to generate.

duration.description: Desired duration of the generated video in seconds. Defaults to 5.

output_path.description: Optional file path to save the generated video (e.g. '/home/user/videos/clip.mp4'). If omitted, a temporary path is returned.

tools.name: text_to_speech
tools.description: Convert text to speech audio using the configured TTS engine.

text.description: Text to convert to spoken audio.

voice.description: Optional voice identifier to use (depends on the configured TTS engine, e.g. 'alloy', 'nova', 'onyx').

language.description: Optional BCP-47 language tag (e.g. 'en-US', 'es-ES', 'fr-FR'). Defaults to the system locale.

output_path.description: Optional file path to save the audio file (e.g. '/tmp/speech.mp3'). If omitted, a temporary path is returned.

tools.name: record_screen
tools.description: Record the desktop screen for a given duration and save it as a video file.

duration.description: Duration to record in seconds. Defaults to 10. If 0 is passed, recording continues until stop_recording is called.

output_path.description: Optional file path to save the recorded video (e.g. '/home/user/recordings/session.mp4'). If omitted, a temporary path is returned.

tools.name: transcribe_audio
tools.description: Transcribe speech from an audio or video file to text using the configured speech recognition engine.

path.description: Absolute path to the audio or video file to transcribe (e.g. '/home/user/recordings/meeting.mp3').
